sources: https://x.com/hartcb (identity/employment confirmation only - no financial data)

https://cryptorank.io/ico/civic (Civic's CVC token FDV is only ~$26M; company raised $33M ICO in 2017 plus $2.75M seed - too small to support a $1M-8M personal net worth claim with no equity/comp data)

people.name: Babacar Lô
people.headline: GitHub profile for the same handle (github.com/loxadim) identifies Babacar Lô, based in Senegal, org "Lamport Lab"; X/Twitter account twitter.com/loxadim independently confirms the same name. Identity

people.name: Gaurang Torvekar
people.headline: Gaurang Torvekar is confirmed as Co-Founder & CTO of Bonzo Finance (DeFi lending protocol); identity corroborated by LinkedIn, personal site, and Bonzo's own team docs. No personal net worth, token al

people.name: Apoorv Shankar
people.headline: Co-founder/CEO of LazyCo (Aina Ring), acquired by Ultrahuman in 2022; became VP Hardware at Ultrahuman; now founder of Project Mirage (AI + hardware, stealth)

people.name: Talal Ahmad Gondal
people.headline: X/Threads/Instagram/Facebook/Medium/about.me all consistently identify @gondal36 as Talal Ahmad Gondal (Dallas-based; YC S21, VC fund-of-funds manager, ex-Amazon per bio) — identity is solid, but no f

people.name: Othman El Ferdaous
people.headline: Moroccan diplomat and politician: Ambassador of Morocco to Côte d'Ivoire; formerly Morocco's Minister of Culture, Youth and Sports (2020-2021)

people.name: Help To Rank
people.headline: Brand/account for a link-building and guest-blogging agency; I found no reliable public evidence tying it to a named individual owner.

people.name: Naoufal El Hassnaoui
people.headline: Confirmed via self-linked GitHub profile (naoufalelh) which explicitly lists X handle @naoufal_elh; he is a Field Engineer at Cursor/Anysphere in Berlin, not an independent founder — no public evidenc

people.name: Abdul Haseeb
people.headline: Pakistan-based (Peshawar) CEO/founder of Crazenators Technologies, a small web development/SEO software services company (~11 employees, reported ~$1M company revenue)

people.name: Rafal Tomal
people.headline: Independent designer/developer in Chicago; founder of 8px.studio/Tomal Design Inc.; former VP of Design at Rainmaker Digital (2010-2018, StudioPress/Copyblogger)

people.name: Unstoppable Domains
people.headline: The account is the company/brand account for Unstoppable Domains, a privately held domain registrar and Web3 digital identity company; GitHub’s verified org page links its X/Twitter as @unstoppableweb
